description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" CompositionCream printed round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a yoke with stitch detailing and a vented hemFitRegularWash careDry clean for the first two washes and hand wash in mild detergent thereafterWarm ironTrue to its name, vishudh specialises in global styles with ethnic Indian threads and print. Combining classic prints with a modern cut to give a slimming silhouette, this Indo-Western kurta blends cut, colour, embellishments and the vibrancy of Indian fabrics to create a garment that you can team with a churidar, shalwar, patialas or even leggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
